tech_news.title: Registry hack lets you bypass Windows 11 KB5083769, KB5083631 patch that blocks some apps - Neowin
tech_news.description: Microsoft earlier confirmed that its latest Windows 11 updates under KB5083769 and KB5083631 have new entries in its blocklist. A Registry fix can unpatch it.

tech_news.title: Why Almost No One Needs An RFID Blocking Wallet Anymore - bgr.com
tech_news.description: One of the more common wallet types you'll see are ones with RFID blocking technology, but it may not be as effective as deterring theft as you think.

tech_news.title: All Life on Earth Comes From One Single Ancestor. And It's So Much Older Than We Thought. - Yahoo
tech_news.description: All life on Earth can be traced back to a Last Universal Common Ancestor, or LUCA—and it likely lived on Earth only 400 million years after its formation.
